subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-07-07 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: The celestial hosts of God are at work. The army is divided into two hosts - one host stationed in the garrison and one host in the field [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جنود ملکوت الهی در کار است.  لشگر بر دو قسم است،  یک لشگر در ساخلو  و یک لشگر در میدان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual warfare; struggle, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @growth of the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
